languages.text: "...прямо в тот момент, когда я занимался экстракцией Матери Теней. Признаться, меня позабавила дерзость примитивных существ, пытающихся убить мой будущий экспонат прямо во время изъятия, и я счел возможным дополнить экспозицию этими эльдарами..."

traits.locale_text: "Древние первозданные эльдары, полученные с мира-корабля Лу'Насад до его гибели на окраинах этого региона. Утраченный ныне вид, с которым у современных друкари больше связей и сходных черт, чем с любой другой их разновидностью".

languages.text: "...just as I was preparing the Mother of Shadows' extraction. I must admit, I was amused by the audacity of the simple creatures who attempted to kill my future exhibit in the middle of her acquisition, and so, I found it acceptable to complement the display with these Aeldari..."
languages.original_text: "...прямо в тот момент, когда я занимался экстракцией Матери Теней. Признаться, меня позабавила дерзость примитивных существ, пытающихся убить мой будущий экспонат прямо во время изъятия, и я счел возможным дополнить экспозицию этими эльдарами..."

traits.locale_text: "...just as I was preparing the Mother of Shadows' extraction. I must admit, I was amused by the audacity of the simple creatures who attempted to kill my future exhibit in the middle of her acquisition, and so, I found it acceptable to complement the display with these Aeldari..."

"...just as I was preparing the Mother of Shadows' extraction. I must admit, I was amused by the audacity of the simple creatures who attempted to kill my future exhibit in the middle of her acquisition, and so, I found it acceptable to complement the display with these Aeldari..."

"Ancient primordial Aeldari, acquired from the craftworld Lu'Nasad before it perished on the fringes of this region. A now lost species with which the modern Drukhari share more ties and similarities than any other of their kind."

"...just as I was preparing the Mother of Shadows' extraction. I must admit, I was amused by the audacity of the simple creatures who attempted to kill my future exhibit in the middle of her acquisition, and so, I found it acceptable to complement the display with these Aeldari..."

"...just as I was preparing the Mother of Shadows' extraction. I must admit, I was amused by the audacity of the simple creatures who attempted to kill my future exhibit in the middle of her acquisition, and so, I found it acceptable to complement the display with these Aeldari..."

languages.text: “……就在我准备提取暗影之母的时候。我必须承认，那些低等生物竟敢在提取过程中，试图杀死我即将到手的藏品，这种胆大妄为让我觉得可笑。于是，我认为把这些艾达灵族加进展品里，也未尝不可……”
languages.original_text: "...just as I was preparing the Mother of Shadows' extraction. I must admit, I was amused by the audacity of the simple creatures who attempted to kill my future exhibit in the middle of her acquisition, and so, I found it acceptable to complement the display with these Aeldari..."

traits.locale_text: “……就在我准备提取暗影之母的时候。我必须承认，那些低等生物竟敢在提取过程中，试图杀死我即将到手的藏品，这种胆大妄为让我觉得可笑。于是，我认为把这些艾达灵族加进展品里，也未尝不可……”

languages.text: « ... au moment où je préparais l'extraction de la Mère des ombres. Je dois l'admettre, j'ai été amusé par l'audace de ces créatures simples, qui ont tenté de tuer ma future pièce d'exposition en plein milieu du processus d'acquisition. J'ai donc trouvé à propos d'ajouter ces quelques Aeldaris à la pièce maîtresse. »
languages.original_text: "...just as I was preparing the Mother of Shadows' extraction. I must admit, I was amused by the audacity of the simple creatures who attempted to kill my future exhibit in the middle of her acquisition, and so, I found it acceptable to complement the display with these Aeldari..."

traits.locale_text: « ... au moment où je préparais l'extraction de la Mère des ombres. Je dois l'admettre, j'ai été amusé par l'audace de ces créatures simples, qui ont tenté de tuer ma future pièce d'exposition en plein milieu du processus d'acquisition. J'ai donc trouvé à propos d'ajouter ces quelques Aeldaris à la pièce maîtresse. »

languages.text: «... justo cuando preparaba la extracción de la Madre de las Sombras. Debo admitir que me divirtió la audacia de las criaturas sencillas que intentaron matar a mi futura exposición durante la adquisición, por lo que consideré aceptable complementarla con estos Aeldari...».
languages.original_text: "...just as I was preparing the Mother of Shadows' extraction. I must admit, I was amused by the audacity of the simple creatures who attempted to kill my future exhibit in the middle of her acquisition, and so, I found it acceptable to complement the display with these Aeldari..."

traits.locale_text: «... justo cuando preparaba la extracción de la Madre de las Sombras. Debo admitir que me divirtió la audacia de las criaturas sencillas que intentaron matar a mi futura exposición durante la adquisición, por lo que consideré aceptable complementarla con estos Aeldari...».

languages.text: "Tam da Gölgelerin Anası'nın çıkarılışını hazırlarken... İtiraf etmeliyim ki gelecekteki sergi parçamı tam ele geçirilirken öldürmeye kalkan basit yaratıkların cüreti beni eğlendirdi ve bu yüzden sergiyi bu Aeldarilerle tamamlamayı uygun buldum..."
languages.original_text: "...just as I was preparing the Mother of Shadows' extraction. I must admit, I was amused by the audacity of the simple creatures who attempted to kill my future exhibit in the middle of her acquisition, and so, I found it acceptable to complement the display with these Aeldari..."

traits.locale_text: "Tam da Gölgelerin Anası'nın çıkarılışını hazırlarken... İtiraf etmeliyim ki gelecekteki sergi parçamı tam ele geçirilirken öldürmeye kalkan basit yaratıkların cüreti beni eğlendirdi ve bu yüzden sergiyi bu Aeldarilerle tamamlamayı uygun buldum..."

languages.text: "... gerade als ich die Extraktion der Mutter der Schatten vorbereitete. Ich gebe zu, ich war angesichts der Frechheit amüsiert, mit der die simplen Kreaturen mein zukünftiges Exponat während seiner Akquise töten wollten. Also hielt ich es für akzeptabel, das Schaustück um diese Aeldari zu erweitern ..."
languages.original_text: "...just as I was preparing the Mother of Shadows' extraction. I must admit, I was amused by the audacity of the simple creatures who attempted to kill my future exhibit in the middle of her acquisition, and so, I found it acceptable to complement the display with these Aeldari..."

traits.locale_text: "... gerade als ich die Extraktion der Mutter der Schatten vorbereitete. Ich gebe zu, ich war angesichts der Frechheit amüsiert, mit der die simplen Kreaturen mein zukünftiges Exponat während seiner Akquise töten wollten. Also hielt ich es für akzeptabel, das Schaustück um diese Aeldari zu erweitern ..."

languages.text: 「…影の母を捕獲する準備をしていた時、その単純な生き物が、私の未来の展示品を捕獲の最中に殺そうとした大胆さに、私は笑いました。そして、このアエルダリを展示に組み込むことにしたのです…」
languages.original_text: "...just as I was preparing the Mother of Shadows' extraction. I must admit, I was amused by the audacity of the simple creatures who attempted to kill my future exhibit in the middle of her acquisition, and so, I found it acceptable to complement the display with these Aeldari..."

traits.locale_text: 「…影の母を捕獲する準備をしていた時、その単純な生き物が、私の未来の展示品を捕獲の最中に殺そうとした大胆さに、私は笑いました。そして、このアエルダリを展示に組み込むことにしたのです…」
